un.caen.model.feild

Class Grid

  • java.lang.Object
    • un.caen.model.feild.Grid

  • public class Grid
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents the game grid, which consists of cells that can hold various items, including players, bombs, mines, and walls. This class provides methods to manipulate the grid, check cell availability, and display the current state of the grid.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Grid(int width, int height)
      Constructs a Grid with the specified width and height.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void display()
      Displays the current state of the grid in the console.
      Cell getCell(Position position)
      Gets the cell at the specified position.
      int getHeight()
      Gets the height of the grid.
      int getWidth()
      Gets the width of the grid.
      java.lang.Boolean isCellAvailable(Position position)
      Checks if the specified position is valid within the grid.
      java.lang.Boolean isPositionValid(Position position) 
      void moveItem(Position position, Position newPosition)
      Moves an item from one position to another in the grid.
      void setCell(Item item, Position position)
      Sets the item in the cell at the specified position.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Grid

        public Grid(int width,
            int height)
        Constructs a Grid with the specified width and height.
        Parameters:
        width - the width of the grid
        height - the height of the grid
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if width or height is less than or equal to zero

    • Method Detail

      • getCell

        public Cell getCell(Position position)
        Gets the cell at the specified position.
        Parameters:
        position - the position of the cell to retrieve
        Returns:
        the Cell at the specified position
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the position is invalid

      • setCell

        public void setCell(Item item,
                    Position position)
        Sets the item in the cell at the specified position.
        Parameters:
        item - the Item to set in the cell
        position - the position of the cell to set the item in
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the position is invalid

      • moveItem

        public void moveItem(Position position,
                     Position newPosition)
        Moves an item from one position to another in the grid.
        Parameters:
        position - the current position of the item
        newPosition - the new position to move the item to
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if either position is invalid

      • display

        public void display()
        Displays the current state of the grid in the console. Each cell is represented by a character or emoji based on its contents.

      • getHeight

        public int getHeight()
        Gets the height of the grid.
        Returns:
        the height of the grid

      • getWidth

        public int getWidth()
        Gets the width of the grid.
        Returns:
        the width of the grid

      • isPositionValid

        public java.lang.Boolean isPositionValid(Position position)

      • isCellAvailable

        public java.lang.Boolean isCellAvailable(Position position)
        Checks if the specified position is valid within the grid.
        Parameters:
        position - the position to check
        Returns:
        true if the position is valid, false otherwise
